textByHashes.4f8d9e47a877b5658c4d0f0016e1c183c12bdefd: I like you, mate. We've really c--connected. You're like a brother to me.
textByHashes.eaec4a4d417e237e56bec796922fa81caecc8668: You see any of those lizards 'round here, you give me a shout. I'll show 'em. Smash 'em.
textByHashes.2e3817259437c9d1ee77af5fccd5baf706550b93: I can't make sense of this, can you?
